summary: Completed frontend testing for accordion dropdown behavior update. All accordions (Services and Why Choose Us) are now closed by default on initial page load and open correctly when clicked.
passed_tests: Page loads without runtime errors or console errors
All 5 service accordions (Garbage cans, Fences, Driveways, Wooden decks, Custom inquiries) are closed on initial page load
Clicking 'Garbage cans' accordion opens it and displays pricing text: 'First time customers get $10 per garbage can, after its $15 per garbage can.'
Why Choose Us accordion is closed on initial page load
Clicking 'Why Choose Us' accordion opens it and displays content: 'Young and ready to earn your business however necessary...'
